strategy - one deployment serves all YieldManager instancesFlow:   1. AI agent reads DEX orderbook off-chain (quotes, tick levels, spreads)   2. AI agent encodes optimal params as strategyData   3. YieldManager calls invest() with tokens + strategyData   4. Strategy places flip order on DEX \u2192 captures spread as yield   5. On withdraw, strategy cancels order \u2192 collects settled funds \u2192 returns to YieldManager","kind":"dev","methods":{"forceWithdraw(address,uint256,uint128,bytes)":{"details":"Called when a params.amount: Amount to withdraw (unused - we always close full position)

returns.withdrawn: Total amount returned (principal + yield from spread)
